title: Crude oil plunges amid rising recessionary fears
section_path: Crude oil plunges amid rising recessionary fears
section_path_text: Crude oil plunges amid rising recessionary fears
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Recession fears gripped commodity markets, with crude oil and metals suffering sharp losses. A stronger USD also weighed on investor sentiment. Crude oil prices slumped as fears of weaker demand amid slowing economic growth outweighed a fundamentally tight market.
